explanations.17: The 'async' keyword means this function can pause and wait for other work to happen, which is useful when handling multiple web requests at once.
explanations.24: Notice this function doesn't have 'async' like the one above — that's fine for simpler operations, but 'async' would be better practice here too for consistency.
explanations.31: This tuple with a status code (404) won't actually work as written — FastAPI needs a special Response object to set HTTP status codes properly.
